title: Stage Equipment Essentials (SEE)
description: Stage Equipment Essentials (SEE) adds a collection of realistic stage gear to Minecraft including speakers, spotlights, trusses, microphones, and more. Perfect for building concert stages, event venues, streaming setups, or immersive roleplay scenes.
body:
# Stage Equipment Essentials (SEE)

**Stage Equipment Essentials (SEE)** is a Minecraft modpack that brings together a curated collection of stage and event-related mods, creating a complete toolkit for building realistic performance environments. It is designed for players who want to build concert stages, event venues, theater productions, and immersive roleplay scenes with professional-level detail.

Instead of adding just a single set of items, SEE combines multiple complementary mods into one cohesive experience. The modpack includes a wide range of detailed stage props such as:

- Speakers  
- Powerful spotlights  
- Trusses  
- Microphones  
- Additional stage and audio equipment  

These additions allow you to outfit your builds with authentic-looking live event gear that enhances both visual quality and overall immersion.

---

## Integrated Theatrical Ecosystem

SEE includes and supports the **Theatrical** ecosystem, a collection of mods focused on recreating the live events and theatre experience in Minecraft.

Theatrical provides:

- Professional lighting systems  
- Advanced sound systems  
- Rigging equipment  
- LED and tungsten fixtures  
- Moving heads  
- Sound desks  
- Stage structures  
- Lighting control systems  

These systems are inspired by real-world production setups and enable highly detailed and technically impressive stage builds.

---

## Theatrical: Extra Lights

The modpack also integrates **Theatrical: Extra Lights**, which significantly expands your lighting options by adding:

- Additional moving heads  
- LED panels  
- Lasers  
- Specialized PARs and strobes  

This allows for more dynamic light shows, dramatic stage scenes, and visually complex concert setups.

---

## Stage Equipment Furnitures

To complete the experience, SEE includes **Stage Equipment Furnitures**, adding decorative and functional pieces that complement the technical equipment. This includes:

- Seating  
- Control consoles  
- Equipment racks  
- Event-themed decorative elements  

These items are ideal for backstage areas, rehearsal rooms, control booths, and fully developed venues.

---

## A Complete Performance Modpack

Together, the included mods form a comprehensive stage and event building modpack for Minecraft.

Whether you are designing:

- Dramatic theater productions  
- Large-scale concert arenas  
- Event venues  
- Immersive roleplay environments  

Stage Equipment Essentials provides everything needed to create fully equipped and believable performance spaces.
